query:
SELECT section, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM payment_transactions WHERE period_no IS NULL GROUP BY section LIMIT 5;
SELECT section, contract_external_id, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM payment_transactions WHERE period_no IS NULL AND section='Fastfone365' GROUP BY section, contract_external_id LIMIT 5;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zL6E4esQEHiYzS.root --database WPSwtnWiTSyEVhTdqqAYk7 --execute SELECT section, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM payment_transactions WHERE period_no IS NULL GROUP BY section LIMIT 5;
SELECT section, contract_external_id, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM payment_transactions WHERE period_no IS NULL AND section='Fastfone365' GROUP BY section, contract_external_id LIMIT 5;
